---
title: "North Dakota Oil and Gas Project"
author: "Kaitlynn Walston"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r libraries, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)

```



```{r dataset, echo=FALSE}
oil_data <- read_xls("GF_ND_Monthly.xls")

months <- 1:nrow(oil_data)
oil_barrels <- oil_data$'Oil/BBL'
gas_mcf <- oil_data$'Gas/MCF'

#constants
price_oil <- 60
price_gas <- 3.00
limit_oil <- 5
limit_gas <- 10

oil_data <- oil_data %>% mutate(
  Month_Index = 1:n(),
  Year = rep(2021:2025, each = 12),
  Oil_Revenue = oil_barrels * price_oil,
  Gas_Revenue = gas_mcf * price_gas,
  Total_Revenue = Oil_Revenue + Gas_Revenue
)


```


```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
yearly_sum <- oil_data %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  summarise(
    Avg_Monthly_Oil = mean(oil_barrels),
    Avg_Monthly_Gas = mean(gas_mcf),
    Total_Oil = sum(oil_barrels),
    Total_Gas = sum(gas_mcf),
    Annual_Revenue = sum(Total_Revenue)
  )

yearly_sum <- oil_data %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  summarise(
    Avg_Monthly_Oil = round(mean(`Oil/BBL`)),
    Avg_Monthly_Gas = round(mean(`Gas/MCF`)),
    Total_Oil = round(sum(`Oil/BBL`)),
    Total_Gas  = round(sum(`Gas/MCF`)),
    Annual_Revenue      = round(sum(Total_Revenue))
  )

# Build display table manually so formatC works correctly row by row
display_table <- data.frame(
  Year              = yearly_sum$Year,
  `Avg Oil (BBL/mo)` = formatC(yearly_sum$Avg_Monthly_Oil, format = "d", big.mark = ","),
  `Avg Gas (MCF/mo)` = formatC(yearly_sum$Avg_Monthly_Gas, format = "d", big.mark = ","),
  `Total Oil (BBL)`  = formatC(yearly_sum$Total_Oil,       format = "d", big.mark = ","),
  `Total Gas (MCF)`  = formatC(yearly_sum$Total_Gas,       format = "d", big.mark = ","),
  `Annual Revenue`   = paste0("$", formatC(yearly_sum$Annual_Revenue, format = "d", big.mark = ",")),  check.names = FALSE
)

knitr::kable(display_table, align = c("c", "r", "r", "r", "r", "r"))
```



```{r calculations, echo=FALSE}
# decline rate (d)
oil_model <- lm(log(oil_barrels) ~ months)
d_oil <- -coef(oil_model)[2]  # monthly decline rate

gas_model <- lm(log(gas_mcf) ~ months)
d_gas <- -coef(gas_model)[2]  # monthly decline rate


# remaining life (months)
cur_q_oil <- tail(oil_barrels, 1)
cur_q_gas <- tail(gas_mcf, 1)

m_left_oil <- log(cur_q_oil / limit_oil) / d_oil
m_left_gas <- log(cur_q_gas / limit_gas) / d_gas


# future revenue
reserv_oil <- (cur_q_oil - limit_oil) / d_oil
reserv_gas <- (cur_q_gas - limit_gas) / d_gas

rev_oil <- reserv_oil * price_oil
rev_gas <- reserv_gas * price_gas

```



```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
cat("--- Decline Rates ---\n")
cat("Oil monthly decline rate:", round(d_oil, 5), "\n")
cat("Gas monthly decline rate:", round(d_gas, 5), "\n")
```
***
```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
cat("--- Remaining Life ---\n")
cat("Oil will last approx.", round(m_left_oil), "more months (",round(m_left_oil/12, 1), "years)\n")
cat("Gas will last approx.", round(m_left_gas), "more months (",round(m_left_gas/12, 1), "years)\n")
```
***
```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
cat("--- Future Revenue Estimate ---\n")
cat("Estimated Future Oil Revenue: $", formatC(round(rev_oil), format = "d", big.mark = ","), "\n")
cat("Estimated Future Gas Revenue: $", formatC(round(rev_gas), format = "d", big.mark = ","), "\n")
cat("Estimated Total Future Revenue: $", formatC(round(rev_oil + rev_gas), format = "d", big.mark = ","), "\n")
```


```{r forecasting, echo=FALSE}

next_months <- (nrow(oil_data) + 1):(nrow(oil_data) + 24)

pred_oil <- exp(predict(oil_model, newdata = data.frame(months = next_months)))
pred_gas <- exp(predict(gas_model, newdata = data.frame(months = next_months)))

forecast_df <- data.frame(
  Month = next_months,
  Predicted_Oil = pred_oil,
  Predicted_Gas = pred_gas,
  Predicted_Rev = (pred_oil * price_oil) + (pred_gas * price_gas)
)

```





*****



```{r plot_oil, echo=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
# Build the fitted curve from the model so it follows the exponential shape
oil_fit <- data.frame(
  Month_Index = months,
  Fitted_Oil  = exp(fitted(oil_model))
)

# Colors — change these to whatever you like
col_actual  <- "blue"   # historical data points
col_fit     <- "orchid"   # historical trend line
col_forecast <- "green"        # forecast line

ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = oil_data,
             aes(x = Month_Index, y = `Oil/BBL`, color = "Actual"),
             alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  geom_line(data = oil_fit,
            aes(x = Month_Index, y = Fitted_Oil, color = "Trend"),
            linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_line(data = forecast_df,
            aes(x = Month, y = Predicted_Oil, color = "Forecast"),
            linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name   = NULL,
    values = c("Actual"= col_actual,
               "Trend"= col_fit,
               "Forecast" = col_forecast),
    breaks = c("Actual", "Trend", "Forecast")   # legend order
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Oil Production: Historical + 24-Month Forecast",
    x     = "Month  (1 = Jan 2021)",
    y     = "Oil Production (BBL/month)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top")
```

*****

```{r plot_gas,echo=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
# Build the fitted curve from the model
gas_fit <- data.frame(
  Month_Index = months,
  Fitted_Gas  = exp(fitted(gas_model))
)

# Colors — change these to whatever you like
col_actual_g  <- "darkorchid"
col_fit_g     <- "violetred"
col_forecast_g <- "cyan"

ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = oil_data,
             aes(x = Month_Index, y = `Gas/MCF`, color = "Actual"),
             alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  geom_line(data = gas_fit,
            aes(x = Month_Index, y = Fitted_Gas, color = "Trend"),
            linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_line(data = forecast_df,
            aes(x = Month, y = Predicted_Gas, color = "Forecast"),
            linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name   = NULL,
    values = c("Actual"   = col_actual_g,
               "Trend"    = col_fit_g,
               "Forecast" = col_forecast_g),
    breaks = c("Actual", "Trend", "Forecast")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Gas Production: Historical + 24-Month Forecast",
    x     = "Month  (1 = Jan 2021)",
    y     = "Gas Production (MCF/month)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top")
```

*****

```{r plot_revenue, echo=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
# Annual revenue line chart — oil, gas, and total trends over 5 years
yearly_rev <- oil_data %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  summarise(
    Oil_Rev   = sum(`Oil/BBL`) * price_oil,
    Gas_Rev   = sum(`Gas/MCF`) * price_gas,
    Total_Rev = Oil_Rev + Gas_Rev
  )

yearly_long <- yearly_rev %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Oil_Rev, Gas_Rev, Total_Rev),
               names_to  = "Type",
               values_to = "Revenue") %>%
  mutate(Type = recode(Type,
                       Oil_Rev   = "Oil",
                       Gas_Rev   = "Gas",
                       Total_Rev = "Total"))

# Colors — change these to whatever you like
col_oil   <- "mediumvioletred"
col_gas   <- "goldenrod"
col_total <- "aquamarine"

ggplot(yearly_long, aes(x = Year, y = Revenue, color = Type, group = Type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("$", round(Revenue / 1e6), "M"),
                vjust = case_when(
                  Type == "Total" ~ -1,   # Total labels above
                  Type == "Oil"   ~  2,   # Oil labels below
                  Type == "Gas"   ~ -1    # Gas labels above
                )),
            size = 3, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name   = NULL,
    values = c(Oil = col_oil, Gas = col_gas, Total = col_total)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2021:2025) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::dollar,
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.15))) +
  labs(
    title = "Annual Revenue by Year  (2021 - 2025)",
    x     = "Year",
    y     = "Revenue (USD)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top")
```

*****

```{r plot_forecast_revenue, echo=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
# Forecasted monthly revenue over the next 24 months
total_proj <- formatC(round(sum(forecast_df$Predicted_Rev)), format = "d", big.mark = ",")

# Color — change to whatever you like
col_rev <- "darkblue"

ggplot(forecast_df, aes(x = Month, y = Predicted_Rev)) +
  geom_area(aes(fill = "Projected Revenue"), alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(color = "Projected Revenue"), linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(name = NULL, values = c("Projected Revenue" = col_rev)) +
  scale_fill_manual( name = NULL, values = c("Projected Revenue" = col_rev)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::dollar) +
  labs(
    title   = paste0("Projected Monthly Revenue  —  Next 24 Months"),
    x = "Month Index",
    y = "Monthly Revenue (USD)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

paste0("Total projected over 24 months: $", total_proj)

```
